# Tray

> Tray is a zero-commission ordering platform for street food stalls, tiffin centers, and canteens. Customers scan the stall's QR, order, pay the stall's UPI directly, and pick up with a token. Owners see orders, revenue, and handovers in real time. One system, three roles, run from a single screen.

Tray is built first for food stalls and tiffin centers near PGs and hostels, and works for any canteen, food court, or QSR (quick-service restaurant) outlet that needs ordering, live queues, and operational oversight in one place. Payments go straight to the stall's own UPI — Tray never holds the money and takes no commission.

## What Tray does
- Customers browse the stall's menu, place orders, pay the stall's UPI directly, and track their token.
- Staff receive orders in a live queue and manage preparation and handover.
- Owners see orders, revenue, and handovers across all their outlets in real time.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://trayy.vercel.app/): Product overview — street food, without the queue.
- [Get started](https://trayy.vercel.app/get-started): Guided setup for a stall, canteen, or institution.
- [Sign up](https://trayy.vercel.app/signup): Create an account.
- [Log in](https://trayy.vercel.app/login): Access your dashboard.
